user_message:
<user_action>
  <context>User initiated a review task. Here's the full review output from reviewer model. User may select one or more comments to resolve.</context>
  <action>review</action>
  <results>
  The recency-decay feature is mostly wired through correctly, but the new `min_volume` smoother uses raw lifetime counts instead of the decayed/valid counts that actually drive scoring. That leaves the ranking change incorrect for decisions with long or partially invalid outcome histories.

Review comment:

- [P2] Compute `min_volume` from decayed outcome volume — /Users/teslamint/workspace/entirecontext/src/entirecontext/core/decisions.py:178-181
  When a decision has one recent outcome plus older outcomes that have effectively decayed away (or rows that `_fetch_decayed_outcome_counts()` skips because their timestamps are future/corrupt), `total` is still computed from raw `counts`, so the smoothing branch never runs. In that scenario `quality_score` gets almost full weight even though only one meaningful outcome remains, which defeats the new `min_volume` contract and can reorder `rank_related_decisions()` results for long-lived decisions.
  </results>
  </user_action>
assistant_summary:
The recency-decay feature is mostly wired through correctly, but the new `min_volume` smoother uses raw lifetime counts instead of the decayed/valid counts that actually drive scoring. That leaves the ranking change incorrect for decisions with long or partially invalid outcome histories.

Review comment:

- [P2] Compute `min_volume` from decayed outcome volume — /Users/teslamint/workspace/entirecontext/src/entirecontext/core/decisions.py:178-181
  When a decision has one recent outcome plus older outcomes that have effectively decayed away (or rows that `_fetch_decayed_outcome_counts()` skips because their timestamps are future/corrupt), `total` is still computed from raw `counts`, so the smoothing branch never runs. In that scenario `quality_score` gets almost full weight even though only one meaningful outcome remains, which defeats the new `min_volume` contract and can reorder `rank_related_decisions()` results for long-lived decisions.
리뷰 지적을 기준으로 원인과 영향 범위를 확인하겠습니다. `min_volume`이 실제 감쇠된 유효 outcome 수가 아니라 raw count를 쓰는지 코드와 테스트를 먼저 대조하겠습니다.
수정 기준을 확정하겠습니다. 먼저 현재 테스트들이 어떤 계약을 이미 고정하고 있는지 조금 더 읽고, 그다음 최소 변경으로 패치하겠습니다.
